Overview  Package  Class   Use  Tree  Deprecated  Index  Help 
 PREV   NEXT FRAMES    NO FRAMES    

Uses of Class
javax.media.mscontrol.MsControlException

Packages that use MsControlException
javax.media.mscontrol Provides a java Application Server with a Media Server Control API. 
javax.media.mscontrol.join An application joins media objects to establish media streams between them. 
javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup A MediaGroup is mostly a player/recorder. 
javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals provides resources for detecting and generating signals: DTMF, speech, .... for any type of media 
javax.media.mscontrol.mixer A MediaMixer has the capacity to combine the media streams coming from multiple sources, into a single media stream. 
javax.media.mscontrol.networkconnection NetworkConnections manage a network termination point, using RTP for an IP network. 
javax.media.mscontrol.resource This package provides the base definitions for managing media processing resources. 
javax.media.mscontrol.resource.video Capabilites to handle video resources, layout and rendering. 
javax.media.mscontrol.spi This package provides classes and interfaces defining a Driver service provider interface (SPI). 
 

Uses of MsControlException in javax.media.mscontrol
 

Subclasses of MsControlException in javax.media.mscontrol
 class MediaConfigException
          The class of things that go wrong during media configuration.
 class MediaException
          MediaException is the parent for [non-Runtime] media Exceptions
 class MediaServiceException
          The class of things that go wrong in MediaService methods.
 class TimeoutException
          Exception thrown when an operation would last more than MediaSession.TIMEOUT
 class TranscodingException
           
 class UnsupportedException
          The class of things that go wrong on the media server when it does not support a media operation sent
 class WrongStateException
           
 

Methods in javax.media.mscontrol that throw MsControlException
 MediaGroup MediaSession.createMediaGroup(Configuration<MediaGroup> predefinedConfig)
          Create a MediaGroup.
 MediaGroup MediaSession.createMediaGroup(Configuration<MediaGroup> predefinedConfig, Parameters params)
          Create a MediaGroup.
 MediaGroup MediaSession.createMediaGroup(MediaConfig config, Parameters params)
          Create a MediaGroup.
 MediaMixer MediaSession.createMediaMixer(Configuration<MediaMixer> predefinedConfig)
          Create a MediaMixer.
 MediaMixer MediaSession.createMediaMixer(Configuration<MediaMixer> predefinedConfig, Parameters params)
          Create a MediaMixer.
 MediaMixer MediaSession.createMediaMixer(MediaConfig config, Parameters params)
          Create a MediaMixer.
 MediaSession MsControlFactory.createMediaSession()
           
 NetworkConnection MediaSession.createNetworkConnection(Configuration<NetworkConnection> predefinedConfig)
          Create a NetworkConnection.
 NetworkConnection MediaSession.createNetworkConnection(Configuration<NetworkConnection> predefinedConfig, Parameters params)
          Create a NetworkConnection.
 NetworkConnection MediaSession.createNetworkConnection(MediaConfig config, Parameters params)
          Create a NetworkConnection.
 VxmlDialog MediaSession.createVxmlDialog(Parameters parameters)
          A VxmlDialog is a Joinable object that can interpret a vxml script

Subclasses of MsControlException in javax.media.mscontrol.join
 class JoinException
           
 class TooManyJoineesException
           
 

Methods in javax.media.mscontrol.join that throw MsControlException
 JoinableStream JoinableContainer.getJoinableStream(JoinableStream.StreamType value)
           
 JoinableStream[] JoinableContainer.getJoinableStreams()
           
 Joinable[] Joinable.getJoinees()
           
 Joinable[] Joinable.getJoinees(Joinable.Direction direction)
           
 void Joinable.join(Joinable.Direction direction, Joinable other)
          Establish a media stream between this object and other.
 void Joinable.joinInitiate(Joinable.Direction direction, Joinable other, java.io.Serializable context)
          Initiates the same action as Joinable.join(javax.media.mscontrol.join.Joinable.Direction, Joinable), but returns immediately, without waiting for the join completion (asynchronous operation).
 void Joinable.unjoin(Joinable other)
          Disconnect any media streams flowing between this object and other's.
 void Joinable.unjoinInitiate(Joinable other, java.io.Serializable context)
          Asynchronous version of unjoin.
 

Uses of MsControlException in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup
 

Methods in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup that throw MsControlException
 Player MediaGroup.getPlayer()
          Returns the Player of this MediaGroup.
 Recorder MediaGroup.getRecorder()
          Returns the Recorder of this MediaGroup.
 SignalDetector MediaGroup.getSignalDetector()
          Returns the SignalDetector of this MediaGroup.
 SignalGenerator MediaGroup.getSignalGenerator()
          Returns the SignalGenerator of this MediaGroup.
 void Player.play(java.net.URI[] streamIDs, RTC[] rtc, Parameters optargs)
          Play the items in a play list sequentially (a composite prompt), identified by the streamIDs.
 void Player.play(java.net.URI streamID, RTC[] rtc, Parameters optargs)
          Play a single play item named by streamID.
 void Recorder.record(java.net.URI streamID, RTC[] rtc, Parameters optargs)
          Record data into the named container (usually a file, local or http), designated by a java.net.URI class.
 

Uses of MsControlException in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals
 

Methods in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals that throw MsControlException
 void SignalGenerator.emitSignals(java.lang.String signals, RTC[] rtc, Parameters optargs)
          Transmit a series of signals out the Terminal to the network.
 void SignalGenerator.emitSignals(Value[] signals, RTC[] rtc, Parameters optargs)
          Transmit a series of signals out the Terminal to the network.
 void SignalDetector.flushBuffer()
          Removes all signals from the signal buffer.
 void SignalDetector.receiveSignals(int numSignals, Parameter[] patternLabels, RTC[] rtcs, Parameters optargs)
          Retrieves some signals from the signal buffer.
